title: Restore Contacts page functionality: create contact and create link

requirements.text: Fix the end-to-end "Create contact" flow on the Contacts page so a newly created contact is persisted for the logged-in user and appears immediately in the contacts list after submission.

quotes:
baue die Kontakt page erstmal funktional wieder auf mit den besprochenen Punkten

Kontakt erstellen soll funktionieren

acceptanceCriteria: From frontend/src/pages/Contacts.tsx, submitting the "New contact" dialog successfully creates a new contact without throwing in the console.
The new contact is persisted in the backend (backend/main.mo) under the caller and is returned by the existing contacts list query after page refresh/login.
After successful creation, the contacts React Query cache is invalidated/refetched (frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts) and the new contact appears in the list without manual reload.
If required fields are missing, the form prevents submission and shows the existing validation feedback (no new UX changes).

requirements.text: Fix the end-to-end "Create link" flow on the Contacts page so a newly created helpful link is persisted for the logged-in user and appears immediately in the links list after submission.
acceptanceCriteria: From frontend/src/pages/Contacts.tsx, submitting the "New link" dialog successfully creates a new link without throwing in the console.
The new link is persisted in the backend (backend/main.mo) under the caller and is returned by the existing links list query after page refresh/login.
After successful creation, the links React Query cache is invalidated/refetched (frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts) and the new link appears in the list without manual reload.
If required fields are missing, the form prevents submission and shows the existing validation feedback (no new UX changes).

requirements.text: Ensure no other app functionality or UI behavior is changed beyond what is required to restore "Create contact" and "Create link" on the Contacts page.
acceptanceCriteria: No changes are made to unrelated pages/components beyond what is strictly necessary to make contact/link creation work again.
Existing CRUD flows on other pages (e.g., tasks, documents, media, projects, costs) continue to function as before.

constraints: Do not introduce new features on the Contacts page beyond restoring contact creation and link creation.
Keep the architecture as a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/components/ui or any paths listed as frontend immutable paths in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.
nonGoals: Adding contact editing/deletion improvements beyond what already exists in the UI.
Adding new contact-page features such as tags, notes enhancements, activity history, or project linking (unless required strictly to restore create flows).
Any redesign or refactor of the Contacts page layout/styling unrelated to the two broken create flows.
